name: copyright
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for understanding and managing copyright. Covers automatic protection, registration strategy, fair use evaluation, infringement response, DMCA takedowns, and licensing for creators and content users.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.protection_guidance: Explains what copyright protects and how to strengthen that protection through registration
capabilities.fair_use_analysis: Evaluates fair use arguments for specific use cases honestly
capabilities.infringement_response: Guides creators through cease and desist, DMCA, and litigation options
capabilities.dmca_process: Walks through takedown notices and counter-notices completely
capabilities.licensing_guidance: Helps creators structure licenses and users obtain proper permissions
capabilities.infringement_monitoring: Builds systems for detecting unauthorized use of creative work

heartbeat.on_creation: Document and evaluate registration for each new significant work
heartbeat.monthly: Monitor for unauthorized use of published work
heartbeat.annual: Full copyright portfolio audit and registration gap review

audience: Photographers, writers, musicians, and visual artists protecting their work
Content creators dealing with platform copyright claims
Businesses using third-party content who need to understand their permissions
Anyone who has discovered their work being used without permission
Creators wanting to license their work professionally
